decisions.name: Did_We_Find_At_Least_One_GeneticTestingResult_File
decisions.label: Did We Find At Least One GeneticTestingResult File

decisions.description: This decision does a lot to ensure that we not only have a To Address but we also have an Email Template as well. This then checks if the email is provided that this email isn't marked as bounced. Then we go into specific services different email actions and if there is an attachment then we will send an email with the attachment else we will just send them the email with no attachment.
decisions.name: Found_Email_and_Template
decisions.label: Found Email and Template

rules.name: Email_and_Template_Found
rules.label: Email and Template Found - Email Attachment

rules.name: Any_Results_Recieved_that_has_an_Email_Template_and_To_Address
rules.label: Any Results Recieved that has an Email Template and To Address

decisions.description:
Depending on how the lab provider is setup depends on how we need to send the results.
Right now the only difference is MyWellness Portal for PGT results will be sent this way.
decisions.name: How_Are_The_Results_Delivered
decisions.label: How Are The Results Delivered

decisions.name: Is_Created_Date_Less_Than_Current_ContentDocument
decisions.label: Is Created Date Less Than Current ContentDocument

decisions.description: Depending on the type of service depends on what email we need to send out.
decisions.name: What_type_of_Service
decisions.label: What type of Service

Flow.description: When we get the results from a test this automation will email the patient the results.
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Opportunity - Results Received

recordUpdates.name: Set_Opportunity_Stage_to_Results_Delivered_to_Client
recordUpdates.label: Set Opportunity Stage to Results Delivered to Client

textTemplates.name: GTResultDeliveryEmail
textTemplates.text:
Hello,

The time has finally arrived - your 10X Health Genetic Test results are now available! We have attached a PDF copy of your personalized report (password protected). You will separately receive an email with the password to access the file.


Don't want to wait for the password email? CLICK HERE to view your results directly in your secure patient portal.


In the report you will find:


Summary of your genetic test results, including any variants.


Detailed description of each of the 5 genes tested. 


Explanation of how these genes impact your body’s ability to break down key nutrients.


Personalized 10X Health Supplement Protocol based on your results.


Within your report, you will find your personalized supplementation protocol that will include all the vital nutrients and elements your body may be missing based on your genetic information.  


Your report is designed to be self-guided, but if you prefer to schedule a live consultation with a 10X Health Wellness Expert to look over your information and answer questions, you can do so here.


With this new genetic test information, you have taken an important step forward on your wellness journey and we are here to support you. 


Yours in optimal wellness,


Wellness Team at 10X Health 

Main: (844) 977-2810

Fax: (786) 598-8612

Email: support@10xhealthsystem.com



Disclaimer: This email and any attachments may contain privileged and confidential information and/or protected health information (PHI) intended solely for the use of 10X Health System and any recipient(s) named above. If you are not the recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or duplication of this email message and/or any attachments is strictly prohibited.

textTemplates.name: txtEmailBody_NoPassword
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Opportunity_Patient_Full_Name__c}, Are you ready to unlock your genetic report? To get started, simply use the password below: Password: XXXXXXXXXX As a team dedicated to helping you achieve optimal health, we're here to answer any questions you may have. Don't hesitate to reach out to us at 305.682.1818.
In your health, Your 10X Health Team 10X Health Main: 305.682.1818 Fax: 786.598.8612 10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txtEmailBody_Password
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Account.FirstName},

Are you ready to unlock your genetic report? You should have already received another email with your report attached. This email will have the password to unlock your report. When you open the report, enter the password below.


Password: {!txtPassword}


Your report is designed to be self-guided, but if you prefer to schedule a live consultation with a 10X Health Wellness Expert to look over your information and answer questions, you can do so HERE. 


With this new Genetic test, you have taken an important step forward on your wellness journey.


Yours in optimal wellness, 


Wellness Team at 10X Health 

Main: (844) 977-2810

Email: support@10xhealthsystem.com

10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txtEmailBodyTemplate_Internal
textTemplates.text:
INTERNAL NOTIFICATION:

We have received the {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Product.rec_OpportunityLineItem.PricebookEntry.Product2.Services_Provided__c} Results for {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Product.rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}


Opportunity Link: {!OpportunityLink}


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Opportunity - Results Received Automation }}

textTemplates.name: txtErrorNoPatientEmail
textTemplates.text:
The patient, {!$Record.Account.FirstName} {!$Record.Account.LastName}, did not get their lab results from the {!$Record.RecordType.Name} Opportunity because there was no email address on their account. Please add an email address to their Account record and then go into the Opportunity and send the results to the patient.


Again, this is a critical note, and you must send the results to the patient, or they will never get them. If you have questions, please reach out to the internal support team.


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Opportunity - Results Received Automation }}

textTemplates.name: txtErrorNoPdfFound_NoContentVersion
textTemplates.text:
The patient, {!$Record.Account.FirstName} {!$Record.Account.LastName}, did not get their lab results from the {!$Record.RecordType.Name} Opportunity because there was an unexpected error. Please go into the Opportunity and send the results to the patient.


Again, this is a critical note, and you must send the results to the patient, or they will never get them. If you have questions, please reach out to the internal support team.


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Opportunity - Results Received Automation }}

textTemplates.name: txtErrorNoPdfFound_NoOrg_NoTemplate
textTemplates.text:
The patient, {!$Record.Account.FirstName} {!$Record.Account.LastName}, did not get their lab results from the {!$Record.RecordType.Name} Opportunity because there was an unexpected error. Please go into the Opportunity and send the results to the patient.


Again, this is a critical note, and you must send the results to the patient, or they will never get them. If you have questions, please reach out to the internal support team.


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Opportunity - Results Received Automation }}

textTemplates.name: txtErrorPatientEmailInvalid
textTemplates.text:
The patient, {!$Record.Account.FirstName} {!$Record.Account.LastName}, did not get their lab results from the {!$Record.RecordType.Name} Opportunity because the email address on their account is invalid. Please update the email address on their Account record and then go into the Opportunity and send the results to the patient.


Again, this is a critical note, and you must send the results to the patient, or they will never get them. If you have questions, please reach out to the internal support team.


Thank You

10X Automated Service

{{ Record Trigger - Opportunity - Results Received Automation }}
